# Pull Request

## Summary

- Describe the user-facing change.

## Validation

- [ ] `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Change area

- [ ] Content or copy
- [ ] Images or organizers data
- [ ] Event timeline or event data
- [ ] Workflow or deployment logic

## Notes for reviewers

- Mention any screenshots, follow-up work, or deployment considerations.
